fluxgarage_roboeyes_i2c_init.message0: Create RoboEyes %1 I2C screen %2 Display object %3 Address %4 Reset pin %5 Maximum frame rate %6
fluxgarage_roboeyes_i2c_init.tooltip: Select and initialize I2C OLED, and create RoboEyes at the same time; supports SSD1306 128×64/128×32 and SH1106G 128×64, the default address is 0x3C (decimal 60)

fluxgarage_roboeyes_spi_init.message0: Create RoboEyes %1 SPI screen %2 Display object %3 DC %4 CS %5 RST %6 Maximum frame rate %7
fluxgarage_roboeyes_spi_init.tooltip: Select and initialize the OLED using the development board's hardware SPI bus, and create RoboEyes; MOSI and SCLK use the development board's default hardware SPI pins

fluxgarage_roboeyes_init.message0: Create RoboEyes %1 using display object %2 width %3 height %4 maximum frame rate %5
fluxgarage_roboeyes_init.tooltip: Create RoboEyes using an Adafruit GFX-compatible display object that has been created and initialized and provides clearDisplay() and display(); automatically calls update() in the main loop

fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_framerate.message0: %1 Set the maximum frame rate %2 FPS
fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_framerate.tooltip: Change the maximum frame rate for animation updates

fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_colors.tooltip: Sets the color values for the background/overlay and eye body; monochrome screens typically use 0 and 1

fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_dimensions.message0: %1 Set eye size Left width %2 Right width %3 Left height %4 Right height %5
fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_dimensions.tooltip: Set the width and height of the left and right eyes in pixels

fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_border_radius.message0: %1 Set eye rounded corners Left %2 Right %3
fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_border_radius.tooltip: Sets the corner radius of the left and right eyes in pixels

fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_spacing.tooltip: Set the distance between the eyes, allowing negative values

fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_mood.tooltip: Smoothly switch the emotional expression of robot eyes

fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_position.tooltip: Smoothly move your gaze to a preset direction

fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_feature.tooltip: Turn curiosity, one-eyed, or sweating effects on or off

fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_flicker.tooltip: Turn horizontal/vertical dithering on or off and set pixel amplitude

fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_autoblinker.message0: %1 Auto Blink Enable %2 Base Interval %3 seconds Randomly vary %4 seconds
fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_autoblinker.tooltip: Configure random automatic blinking; the interval and random change units are whole seconds

fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_idle_mode.message0: %1 Random sight enabled %2 Base interval %3 seconds Random variation %4 seconds
fluxgarage_roboeyes_set_idle_mode.tooltip: Configure random gaze movement; both interval and random change units are whole seconds

fluxgarage_roboeyes_eye_action.tooltip: Open, close or blink both eyes/eyes

fluxgarage_roboeyes_play_animation.tooltip: Play a confused or laughing preset animation

fluxgarage_roboeyes_refresh.tooltip: Advanced manual refresh; initialization block has automatically added framerate-limited update() to the main loop

fluxgarage_roboeyes_get_constraint.tooltip: Returns the maximum X or Y position allowed by the current eye geometry
